summary: All 24 assertions for milestone 'tramites-reportes-auditoria-config' were already validated and passed during the 'dashboard-citas-usuarios' milestone run (where these features were first completed). Assertions cover: Trámites (5), Reportes (4), Auditoría (4), Configuración (6), Design Quality (4), and Cross-area (1). Services confirmed healthy: frontend (3000) and backend (3001) both return HTTP 200.
